objective:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: mean_reversion_bollinger_rsi
archetype: mean_reversion_bollinger_rsi
family: mean_reversion
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
- bollinger(period=10, std_dev=2.9)
- rsi(period=12)
- atr(period=14)
entry:
- long: close < bollinger.lower and rsi < 30
- short: close > bollinger.upper and rsi > 70
exit:
- condition: close crosses bollinger.middle or rsi crosses 50
risk:
stop_atr_mult: 1.25
tp_atr_mult: 4.0
description: ATR stop-loss (1.25x) and take-profit (4.0x)
constraints:
- no_lookahead: true
- only_registry_indicators: true

iterations.hypothesis: Combining Bollinger Bands and RSI with ATR-based stop loss/take profit will help to capture mean reverting trades in the given time frame.
